import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/org-admin/EmergencySafetyManagement.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/EmergencySafetyManagement.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import {
  Phone,
  Plus,
  Edit,
  Trash2,
  Save,
  MapPin,
  FileText,
  Link as LinkIcon
} from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
const initialContacts = [
  { id: "1", name: "Emergency Services", role: "Police", phone: "911", type: "police" },
  { id: "2", name: "City General Hospital", role: "Emergency Room", phone: "555-0100", type: "hospital" },
  { id: "3", name: "John Anderson", role: "Safety Manager", phone: "555-0123", type: "manager" },
  { id: "4", name: "Fire Department", role: "Emergency Response", phone: "911", type: "fire" }
];
const initialProcedures = [
  { id: "1", title: "Fire Emergency Procedure", type: "fire", linkedDocumentId: "doc-1" },
  { id: "2", title: "Medical Emergency Response", type: "medical", linkedDocumentId: "doc-2" },
  { id: "3", title: "Security Threat Protocol", type: "security", linkedDocumentId: "doc-3" },
  { id: "4", title: "Natural Disaster Response", type: "natural", linkedDocumentId: "doc-4" }
];
export default function EmergencySafetyManagement() {
  _s();
  const [contacts, setContacts] = useState(initialContacts);
  const [procedures, setProcedures] = useState(initialProcedures);
  const [editingContact, setEditingContact] = useState(null);
  const [editingProcedure, setEditingProcedure] = useState(null);
  const [showAddAssemblyPoint, setShowAddAssemblyPoint] = useState(false);
  const handleSaveContact = () => {
    if (editingContact) {
      if (editingContact.id) {
        setContacts(contacts.map((c) => c.id === editingContact.id ? editingContact : c));
      } else {
        setContacts([...contacts, { ...editingContact, id: Date.now().toString() }]);
      }
      setEditingContact(null);
      alert("✅ Contact saved successfully");
    }
  };
  const handleDeleteContact = (id) => {
    if (confirm("Delete this contact?")) {
      setContacts(contacts.filter((c) => c.id !== id));
      alert("🗑️ Contact deleted");
    }
  };
  const handleSaveProcedure = () => {
    if (editingProcedure) {
      if (editingProcedure.id) {
        setProcedures(procedures.map((p) => p.id === editingProcedure.id ? editingProcedure : p));
      } else {
        setProcedures([...procedures, { ...editingProcedure, id: Date.now().toString() }]);
      }
      setEditingProcedure(null);
      alert("✅ Procedure saved successfully");
    }
  };
  const handleDeleteProcedure = (id) => {
    if (confirm("Delete this procedure?")) {
      setProcedures(procedures.filter((p) => p.id !== id));
      alert("🗑️ Procedure deleted");
    }
  };

}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/org-admin/EmergencySafetyManagement.tsx", currentExports);
